callGraph.callee:
[
          `M 18 ${CENTER_Y + duct / 2}`,
          `L 44 ${CENTER_Y + duct / 2}`,
          `L 84 ${CENTER_Y - 26 + duct / 2}`,
          `L 84 ${CENTER_Y - 26 - duct / 2}`,
          `L 44 ${CENTER_Y - duct / 2}`,
          `L 18 ${CENTER_Y - duct / 2}`,
          'Z',
        ].join

[
          `M 18 ${CENTER_Y + duct / 2}`,
          `L 42 ${CENTER_Y + duct / 2}`,
          `L 60 ${CENTER_Y + duct / 2}`,
          `L 60 ${CENTER_Y - 2}`,
          `L 84 ${CENTER_Y - 2}`,
          `L 84 ${CENTER_Y - 26 - duct / 2}`,
          `L 60 ${CENTER_Y - 26 - duct / 2}`,
          `L 42 ${CENTER_Y - duct / 2}`,
          `L 18 ${CENTER_Y - duct / 2}`,
          'Z',
        ].join

functions.name: Stepper
params:
{
  decrementLabel,
  incrementLabel,
  max,
  min,
  onChange,
  step,
  unit,
  value,
  valueDigits = 0,
}

functions.name: InspectorPanel
params:
{
  className,
  embedded = false,
  showHeader = false,
  onFloat,
  onHighlightInBOM,
}

callGraph.callee:
selectedIds
      .map((id) => byId[id])
      .filter((entity): entity is Entity => Boolean(entity))
      .map
